Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Dan Schrauth appearing for petitioner. John Mangini appearing for trustee. The trustee will prepare an accounting by 6/30. Matter is set for status on 7/5. Matter granted. Counsel to prepare order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
